headline: Northern Trust Named to The Civic 50 for 2026, Recognizing Leadership in Corporate Citizenship and Community Impact
summary: CHICAGO, June 24, 2026--Northern Trust has been named to The Civic 50 for 2026, an annual recognition by Points of Light.

raw.summary: CHICAGO, June 24, 2026--Northern Trust has been named to The Civic 50 for 2026, an annual recognition by Points of Light.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Northern Trust, Raises Price Target to $189
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Mike Mayo   maintains Northern Trust (NASDAQ:NTRS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $175 to $189.
